diagrams.title: College Event Management System - Complete Use Case Diagram
diagrams.mermaid:
graph TB A1["👤 A1: Student"] A2["👤 A2: Organizer"] UC1["UC1: View Events"] UC2["UC2: Register
for Event"] UC3["UC3: Sign Up"] UC4["UC4: Log In"] UC5["UC5: View
Registrations"] UC6["UC6: Manage
Events"] UC7["UC7: View Statistics"] UC8["UC8: Process
Payment"] UC9["UC9: Export
Data"] A1 --> UC1 A1 --> UC2 A1 --> UC3 A1 --> UC4 A1 --> UC5 A1 --> UC8 A2 --> UC4 A2 --> UC6 A2 --> UC7 A2 --> UC9 UC2 --> UC8 UC6 --> UC4 UC7 --> UC4 UC9 --> UC4

diagrams.title: Student Journey - View, Register, Pay, Receive Ticket
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart TD Start(["Student Visits Website"]) --> SignupCheck{"Has Account?"} SignupCheck -->|No| SignUp["UC3: Sign Up
FR-4: Use College Email"] SignUp --> LogIn["UC4: Log In
FR-5: Authenticate"] SignupCheck -->|Yes| LogIn LogIn --> ViewEvents["UC1: View Events
FR-1: Browse Upcoming Events"] ViewEvents --> SelectEvent{"Event Found?"} SelectEvent -->|No| ViewEvents SelectEvent -->|Yes| Register["UC2: Register for Event
FR-2, FR-12: Collect Name, Email, etc."] Register --> PaidEvent{"Paid Event?"} PaidEvent -->|No| ConfirmEmail["FR-3: Send Confirmation
Email to Student"] PaidEvent -->|Yes| Payment["UC8: Process Payment
FR-13: Razorpay Integration"] Payment --> PaymentCheck{"Payment
Successful?"} PaymentCheck -->|No| PaymentFailed["Payment Failed"] PaymentFailed --> Register PaymentCheck -->|Yes| Ticket["FR-14: Generate PDF
Ticket with QR Code"] Ticket --> ConfirmEmail ConfirmEmail --> ViewReg["UC5: View Registrations
FR-6: See Past/Upcoming Events"] ViewReg --> End(["Registration Complete"])

diagrams.title: Organizer Workflow - Create, Manage, Monitor Events
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart TD Start(["Organizer Logs In"]) --> Auth["UC4: Log In
FR-5: Authenticate"] Auth --> Dashboard["FR-7: Admin Dashboard"] Dashboard --> Action{"Select Action"} Action -->|Manage| Create["UC6: Manage Events"] Create --> CreateSub{"Operation"} CreateSub -->|Create| CreateE["FR-8: Create
New Event"] CreateSub -->|Edit| EditE["FR-9: Edit
Existing Event"] CreateSub -->|Delete| DeleteE["FR-10: Delete
Event"] CreateE --> Dashboard EditE --> Dashboard DeleteE --> Dashboard Action -->|Monitor| Stats["UC7: View Stats
FR-11: Display Registration
Analytics"] Stats --> Dashboard Action -->|Export| Export["UC9: Export Data
FR-15: CSV Format"] Export --> Download["Participant List
Downloaded"] Download --> Dashboard

diagrams.title: Payment Processing Sequence
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR Student["Student"] -->|Initiates Payment| Register["Registration
System"] Register -->|FR-13: Integration| RazorPay["Razorpay
Gateway"] RazorPay -->|Process Payment| Bank["Bank"] Bank -->|Success/Fail| RazorPay RazorPay -->|Status| Register Register -->|Payment Success| Ticket["UC8: Process Payment
Generate Ticket"] Ticket -->|FR-14: Generate PDF
with QR Code| PDF["PDF Ticket"] PDF -->|Deliver| Student Register -->|Payment Fail| Retry["Retry Payment"] Retry -->|Re-initiate| Register

diagrams.title: System State Machine - Student Registration States
diagrams.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2 [*] --> NotAuthenticated: Start NotAuthenticated --> AccountCreated: UC3: Sign Up AccountCreated --> Authenticated: UC4: Log In NotAuthenticated --> Authenticated: UC4: Log In Authenticated --> BrowsingEvents: UC1: View Events BrowsingEvents --> BrowsingEvents: Browse Multiple Events BrowsingEvents --> EventSelected: Select Event Authenticated --> ViewMyReg: UC5: View Registrations ViewMyReg --> BrowsingEvents EventSelected --> RegistrationForm: UC2: Register for Event RegistrationForm --> DataCollection: FR-12: Collect Info DataCollection --> CheckPayment: Is Paid Event? CheckPayment --> FreeEvent: No Payment Required FreeEvent --> SendConfirm: FR-3: Send Confirmation CheckPayment --> ProcessPayment: UC8: Process Payment ProcessPayment --> PaymentPending: FR-13: Razorpay Integration PaymentPending --> PaymentSuccess: Payment Approved PaymentPending --> PaymentFailed: Payment Rejected PaymentFailed --> ProcessPayment: Retry Payment PaymentSuccess --> GenerateTicket: FR-14: Generate PDF
with QR Code GenerateTicket --> SendConfirm SendConfirm --> Registered: Registration Complete Registered --> [*]: End
